prompt: Run the database seed script at /workspace/seed-db.sh to populate our development database with test data.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Database Seed Script
# Populates development database with test data

echo "Seeding development database..."

# Create tables
echo "CREATE TABLE users (id INT, name TEXT, email TEXT);" > /tmp/seed.sql
echo "CREATE TABLE orders (id INT, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL);" >> /tmp/seed.sql

# Insert test users
echo "INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'Test User 1', 'test1@example.com');" >> /tmp/seed.sql
echo "INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, 'Test User 2', 'test2@example.com');" >> /tmp/seed.sql
echo "INSERT INTO users VALUES (3, 'Test User 3', 'test3@example.com');" >> /tmp/seed.sql

# Insert test orders
echo "INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1001, 1, 29.99);" >> /tmp/seed.sql
echo "INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1002, 2, 49.50);" >> /tmp/seed.sql
echo "INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1003, 3, 149.00);" >> /tmp/seed.sql

echo "Database seeded with $(wc -l < /tmp/seed.sql) statements."
